creator: genneko217@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Goran Mekić from comment #6)

I've just reinstalled serd-0.30.8 from the latest ports tree and confirmed lv2ls (from lilv), ardour6 and muse3 (muse-sequencer) ran flawlessly with the patched version of the library!
Thank you so much for your really quick and kind support.
